prestazioni: Engine: F7R 2.0L 16V (F7R 730/732) with forged internals including Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (87.5mm, 11.5:1 CR), Pauter billet steel connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings for 9,000 RPM reliability. Paired with a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) and custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust with a GReddy Revolution RS muffler for optimized spool and 280 HP at 1.2 bar boost.

Drivetrain: Quaife ATB helical LSD (QDF7J) with uprated clutch from Sachs Performance (320mm twin-disc setup) and a reinforced gearbox using a Tran-X close-ratio gearset (1st: 2.923, 2nd: 2.048, 3rd: 1.455) with a short-shift kit from Renault Sport (OEM part #8200044691).

Suspension: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (CLIO II-specific valving) with Eibach Pro-Kit helper springs, polybushings from SuperPro (part #SPF1045K) for the rear beam, and a Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (22mm, part #BKR97X). Braking upgraded to AP Racing 4-piston calipers (CP5200) with 300mm slotted rotors and Ferodo DS2500 pads.
estetica: Body: Full carbon fiber widebody kit from Liberty Walk (LB-WORKS CLIO II kit) with custom front splitter and rear diffuser from Seibon Carbon, retaining the original Williams blue (Renault Sport 449) with matte clear coat. OEM-style side skirts from Cup Clio (part #7701472491) for period-correct aggression.

Wheels: Work Meister S1 3P 16x8.5 ET30 (front) and 16x9.5 ET25 (rear) in gloss gunmetal, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (215/40/16 front, 235/40/16 rear). OEM Williams gold decals retained with added carbon fiber mirror caps from Maxton Design (part #MX2003).

Interior: Full Recaro Pole Position seats (cloth, part #380.000) with Schroth Profi II 4-point harnesses, OMP steering wheel (330mm, suede) on a NRG quick-release hub, and a custom roll cage from Custom Cages (FIA-spec, T45 steel) painted in Williams blue. Dashboard retains OEM VDO gauges with added Defi Advance BF oil pressure and boost gauges in a carbon fiber pod.
